description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a wooden privacy fence and landscaped garden beds. The structure features a flat roof with a small chimney and a central entrance, flanked by large windows and a wooden deck that extends into the yard. The yard is divided into sections with paved walkways, raised planters, and green grass, creating a harmonious blend of natural and built elements. The fence is constructed from horizontal wooden slats, providing both security and aesthetic appeal, while climbing plants add greenery to the perimeter. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a focus on outdoor living spaces. The bungalow appears to be constructed primarily from wood, with some concrete or stone elements in the walkways and planters.
description: A modern, single-story wooden bungalow with a flat roof, surrounded by a landscaped yard and horizontal slat fencing. Features include a central entrance, large windows, and extensive outdoor decking.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central deck, and the full width of the wooden fence with greenery along the perimeter.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the yard, the arrangement of walkways, and the flat roof of the bungalow.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bungalow, the continuation of the wooden fence, and the landscaped garden beds.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the approach to the entrance, the deck, and the symmetrical layout of the garden and walkways.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
